overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a Tarnished character exploring the Gravesite Plain. The clip begins in golden hour light near a burning Furnace Golem and transitions through a darkening grassy field into a rainy, blue-lit graveyard with floating rock formations and shallow water.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with burning colossal structure

events.description: character begins moving away from massive burning furnace golem

agents.ego_description: armored character walking through tall golden grass away from a burning cage-like giant

entered.detail: colossal burning cage-like structure with intense orange flames and embers
dense golden-brown grass covering the ground
tall dark stone cliff with cave entrance
white stone grave markers scattered throughout the grass
deciduous trees with orange and brown autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a character in ornate armor standing near a massive burning structure known as a Furnace Golem. The environment is bathed in golden hour light with tall grass swaying in the wind. The character begins walking away from the fiery giant toward an open field dotted with tombstones and autumn trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland transitioning to forested area

events.description: ambient light gradually darkens from golden hour to dusk tones
weather shifts abruptly to rain with dark blue atmospheric lighting

agents.ego_description: character continues jogging steadily through the field toward distant pine trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen coniferous trees lining the path ahead
large stone ruins visible on the horizon against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the grassland as the lighting gradually shifts from warm golden hour toward cooler dusk tones. Pine trees become visible in the distance while the burning golem and initial cliff face disappear behind. The environment begins to darken significantly as rain starts to fall around the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark rainy graveyard with glowing markers

events.description: abrupt transition to dark blue rainy atmosphere with reduced visibility
tombstones begin emitting pale white glow in the darkness

agents.ego_description: character moves through dark tall grass with glowing grave markers visible on either side

entered.detail: massive flat rock formation suspended in mid-air against the cliff

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts dramatically to a dark, rainy atmosphere with blue-toned lighting. The character traverses a graveyard where tombstones glow with pale light. A massive floating rock platform becomes visible to the right, hovering near the cliff face as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow pool beneath floating rock overhang

events.description: approaching rocky outcrop and shallow water pool
location text 'Gravesite Plain' appears on screen
character enters shallow water creating splashes

agents.ego_description: character approaches and wades into a shallow pool beneath the floating rock formation

entered.detail: calm reflective water with lily pads at the base of the cliff
large stone ledge extending from the cliff face overhead
clusters of bright yellow flowers growing at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a shallow pool at the base of the cliff, entering the water as the location name 'Gravesite Plain' appears on screen. The massive floating rock platform now dominates the center view overhead, while yellow wildflowers dot the water's edge. The scene ends with the character wading through the reflective pool in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a warm, fiery landscape into a cold, rain-drenched graveyard. It begins with a character in ornate armor walking away from a massive, burning Furnace Golem through tall grass bathed in golden hour light. As the character moves deeper into the grassland, the warm glow fades into cooler dusk tones and the fiery giant disappears behind a cliff face just as rain begins to fall. The scene then shifts dramatically into a dark, blue-toned atmosphere where the character traverses a graveyard of glowing tombstones beneath a massive floating rock platform. Finally, the camera follows the character into a shallow, reflective pool at the base of a cliff, where yellow wildflowers dot the water's edge under the rainy sky as the location name Gravesite Plain appears.
